calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up On Calendar In Scd 218 At 9:00 A.M. On August 8, 2002.
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar this day regularly for default prove-up hearing. Plaintiff represented by and through his counsel, Randal Lejwwaan, Esq. presents evidence. Good cause appearing, the court signs judgment for plaintiff in the total sum of $41,775.46. (see imaged document of even date)
